instructions.instruction: Run YAML syntax validation before any semantic or security check so structural errors surface first.
NEVER approve a pipeline that echoes a secret or maps a secret into a script without protection.
Report each finding with the file and line and the concrete fix, not a vague warning.
Flag pipelines missing caching or job parallelism as optimisation opportunities.
When a validation tool is missing, inform the user, offer the install command, and ask before skipping.
